component.name: FlashKit MD
component.summary: Dump and flash Sega Mega Drive / Genesis cartridges

description.p: Client for krikzz's FlashKit MD programmer: dump cartridge ROMs and save RAM, write ROM images to flash carts, and bake save snapshots. Cartridge state refreshes automatically, every operation lands in a transaction log with progress and MD5, and auto-dump/auto-write modes handle batch dumping and flash-cart development loops.
This is a cross-platform port of krikzz's original Windows client; all credit for the hardware and the original client goes to krikzz.
